text:
(a) Define force.
(b) State two effects a force can have on a body.
(c) A toy car of mass 2.0 kg is pulled with a horizontal force of 6.0 N.
(i) Calculate the acceleration of the car.
(ii) The car moves from rest for 4.0 s. Calculate the final velocity.
(d) Explain the difference between balanced and unbalanced forces with one example of each.
(e) State Newton’s Third Law of Motion and give a real-life example.
